name: @pryzm/plugin-ceiling
description: PRYZM 2 — Ceiling plugin (S14-T8). Headless half: Store<CeilingData>, typed errors, 4 handlers (CreateCeiling / DeleteCeiling / SetCeilingBoundary / SetCeilingHeight). Producer (packages/geometry-kernel/src/producers/ceiling.ts) emits a triangulated planar polygon with top + bottom + edge material slots. Committer / tool live under src/committer/.
